backlog.title: Configure trusted reverse proxies if Control UI is proxied
backlog.description: Set gateway.trustedProxies to the actual proxy IPs, or explicitly keep the Control UI local-only.

backlog.title: Replace ineffective denyCommands entries with exact command IDs
backlog.description: Audit gateway.nodes.denyCommands and remove unknown entries like camera.snap, camera.clip, screen.record, contacts.add, calendar.add, reminders.add, and sms.send.

inProgress.title: Polish mission control dashboard UI
inProgress.description: Improve visual hierarchy, add richer status cards, and make the board feel like a real command center.

complete.title: Lock down OpenClaw credentials directory permissions
complete.description: Applied chmod 700 to ~/.openclaw/credentials and re-ran the audit successfully.

complete.title: Build mission control board
complete.description: Status, health, security score, issues, and kanban board.
